title: Saudi Arabia charges record premium for its oil
summary: World’s biggest crude exporter to ask Asian customers for around $20 a barrel on top of benchmark prices

title: Nearly 50 Qatar LNG Tankers Sit Idle Across Asia
summary: Almost 50 liquefied natural gas carriers used by Qatar to export the superchilled fuel are idled in Asia, Bloomberg has reported, citing data from Kpler. All the vessels are empty, the data shows. The LNG carriers are accumulated in a handful of locations, including West India, Sri Lanka, close to …
